_notes: Rider profiles for handicap prediction. Update after each race.
_units: weight_kg, height_cm, power in watts, cda in m^2, crr dimensionless

Waterhouse.notes: Sangbagging dog. R2 DNF (17min only), R3 win at 278W/3.8wkg. CdA calibrated from R2+R3 fit data.

Heslop.notes: The Diesel. Very consistent. R2 210W, R3 237W (struggled on day). CdA calibrated from fit data. Nudged up to 235W to reflect normal-day ability.

Einoder.notes: Lightest gym enthusiast, low absolute power but decent w/kg on climbs. R2 152W, R3 156W. Power nudged to 152W, fade 7% to match R3 actual.

Barton.notes: The Fridge. 135kg makes climbs brutal. R2 220W, R3 200W (faded, ~1min tech issues). Power set to 205W, fade 6%. Given a small helping hand — zero wins in series.

Baum.notes: Pissgargling triathlete. Only raced R2 (253W, 3.33wkg). DNS R1 and R3. High fade (8%) observed in R2. Limited data — 1 race only.

Bone.notes: Big Glands Bone. ZERO race data. Self-reported FTP 215W but has never raced. Avg power set conservatively at 185W (85% of stated FTP). Assume 5% fade. All values are guesses.
